psa: Unemployment rate: 4.2% (Q4 2023), down from 4.5% (Q3). Services growth: 2.1%, IT growth: -0.5%, Agriculture growth: 1.0%, Retail growth: 0.8%, Manufacturing growth: 0.3%, Construction growth: -1.2%. Average salary IT: PHP 50,000.
dole: Job demand IT: +15% YoY, Services: +10%, Agriculture: +5%, Retail: +2%, Manufacturing: 0%, Construction: -5%. High demand in IT and services.
